formcheckout.name: formcheckout
formcheckout.description: Checkout starter — two flavors (CheckoutSteps multi-step, CheckoutSingle one-page) wiring PrtForm + address fields + radio-card delivery + the #payment-fields iframe slot + order summary; zero money math, app-owned schema

PrtAppShell.name: PrtAppShell
PrtAppShell.description: Thin CSS-Grid frame — header/sidebar/main/aside/footer regions, auto-track offset (width-agnostic, sizes to the slotted sidebar), optional regions collapse with no jump, main is the sole scroller; owns no state

PrtAudioPlayer.name: PrtAudioPlayer
PrtAudioPlayer.description: Audio transport on useMediaControls + PrtSlider seek/volume, Media Session media keys, opt-in Web-Audio waveform

PrtAudioRecorder.name: PrtAudioRecorder
PrtAudioRecorder.description: MediaRecorder capture: WebM/Opus output (extension derived from the Blob type, never .mp3), reason-code errors, opt-in level meter, decoupled save(blob, meta)

PrtAvatar.name: PrtAvatar
PrtAvatar.description: Avatar: image with seeded initials/icon fallback

PrtBadge.name: PrtBadge
PrtBadge.description: Count and status badge: inline or corner overlay, dot mode, seed or intent toned

PrtBanner.name: PrtBanner
PrtBanner.description: Hero / promo block recipe — overlay (text over media + oklab scrim) or split (two-col); media is a slot over PrtLazyImg, container-query responsive, fluid cqi heading

PrtBreadcrumb.name: PrtBreadcrumb
PrtBreadcrumb.description: Breadcrumb trail — muted links, ink on the current page, mono slash separator (slot-swappable); wraps cleanly, no truncation logic

PrtBtn.name: PrtBtn
PrtBtn.description: Button with variant × seed × size matrix, loading and polymorphic root

PrtCard.name: PrtCard
PrtCard.description: Surface card with image/header/content/footer slots — hairline edges, tokenized elevation

PrtCarousel.name: PrtCarousel
PrtCarousel.description: Embla-powered carousel shell: slot slides, ghost arrows, square/circle dot pager, loop/autoplay, seed surfaces

PrtChatBubble.name: PrtChatBubble
PrtChatBubble.description: Chat message bubble with the seed-driven arrow tail (CSS-var color, never runtime classes), sent/received alignment and grouping

PrtCheckbox.name: PrtCheckbox
PrtCheckbox.description: Boolean checkbox with hidden native input, identity-colored check, optional inline label

PrtCheckoutAddressFields.name: PrtCheckoutAddressFields
PrtCheckoutAddressFields.description: A no-inject grouping of PrtFormField rows with the Baymard address rules baked in (exact autocomplete table, inputmode, Address-Line-2 toggle, country→region combobox); one v-model, names drive form validation

PrtCheckoutOrderSummary.name: PrtCheckoutOrderSummary
PrtCheckoutOrderSummary.description: Checkout order-summary panel — pre-formatted price strings only (zero money math), <dl> totals with aria-live, collapsed auto-apply-on-blur promo, optional quantity steppers; flat panel, slots for trust signals

PrtChip.name: PrtChip
PrtChip.description: Tag/label chip: variant × seed matrix, optional icon and dismiss

PrtCodeBlock.name: PrtCodeBlock
PrtCodeBlock.description: Atomic, tree-shakeable code block: zero-dep styled wrapper + an OPTIONAL copied lib/highlight.ts Shiki singleton (fine-grained core + JS regex engine, no WASM). Dual-theme via --shiki-* vars flipped by data-mode (zero re-render, no !important). Unused = zero highlighter bytes; used = one lazy chunk. Leaf component — nothing else may import it.

PrtCollapsible.name: PrtCollapsible
PrtCollapsible.description: Single-disclosure primitive — quiet trigger row + grid 0fr→1fr height animation (one technique, both browsers); accordion is consumer composition

PrtCombobox.name: PrtCombobox
PrtCombobox.description: Searchable combobox/autocomplete merge — typed values or freeText, anchored flat panel (popover=manual), filtering with a capped tail, clearable, async loading hooks

PrtCountdown.name: PrtCountdown
PrtCountdown.description: Counts down to a target instant; slot-first parts render, wall-clock tick via useIntervalFn, <time> semantics

PrtDialog.name: PrtDialog
PrtDialog.description: Modal dialog on the native <dialog> substrate — top layer, token scrim, scroll lock with reserved gutter, Esc/outside close via closedby; confirm is a demo preset

PrtDrawer.name: PrtDrawer
PrtDrawer.description: Edge sheet (left/right/bottom) on the native <dialog> substrate — animated slide in AND out (the one JS-assisted exit), token scrim, scroll lock with reserved gutter

PrtEmptyState.name: PrtEmptyState
PrtEmptyState.description: Neutral empty-state chrome — icon + one line + one action slot; no intent, no dismiss (that's PrtNotice)

PrtExcerpt.name: PrtExcerpt
PrtExcerpt.description: Line-clamp with more/less reveal: legacy -webkit-line-clamp combo (interop), instant toggle, optional edge fade, v-model:expanded

PrtFab.name: PrtFab
PrtFab.description: Floating action button / speed-dial: fan-out actions on Popover API + CSS anchor positioning, placement baked in, seed-tinted

PrtFacet.name: PrtFacet
PrtFacet.description: Facet-section chrome — header label + active count + clear emit + collapsible body around ANY control; the app owns the filter state

PrtFilterBar.name: PrtFilterBar
PrtFilterBar.description: Checkbox facet group — array v-model with toggle semantics, optional counts and header clear; the app owns filter semantics

PrtForm.name: PrtForm
PrtForm.description: Form context provider: Standard Schema validation, dot-path errors, reward-early-punish-late display gating

PrtFormField.name: PrtFormField
PrtFormField.description: Form field: label, input, description, error and helper text

PrtGallery.name: PrtGallery
PrtGallery.description: Image-specialized grid: lazyimg cells, uniform-aspect grid or CSS-columns masonry, optional selection, built-in lightbox trigger with the View-Transition morph

PrtGoToTop.name: PrtGoToTop
PrtGoToTop.description: Placed-for-you scroll-to-top button: reveals past a threshold (useWindowScroll), smooth-scrolls up, seed-tinted

PrtIndexBar.name: PrtIndexBar
PrtIndexBar.description: A–Z directory — first-letter grouping + locale sort, link items, and a sticky letter rail with jump + scrollspy

PrtInfiniteScroll.name: PrtInfiniteScroll
PrtInfiniteScroll.description: Load-more engine — IntersectionObserver sentinel wrapping anything; guarded load-more emit, autoload, loader/end slots

PrtInput.name: PrtInput
PrtInput.description: Text input with filled/outline/minimal variants, error and disabled states

PrtInputNumber.name: PrtInputNumber
PrtInputNumber.description: Number input with stepper buttons; modelValue is number | null — empty is null, never a silent 0

PrtLanguageSwitcher.name: PrtLanguageSwitcher
PrtLanguageSwitcher.description: App-owned locale switcher — endonyms with translate="no"/:lang + OPT-IN per-option flag icon class (ready-made Iconify, e.g. i-circle-flags-es), menu/segmented/buttons presentations over PrtMenu/PrtSegmented/PrtBtn; no i18n dep, no locale data

PrtLazyImg.name: PrtLazyImg
PrtLazyImg.description: House image primitive: native lazy loading, reserved aspect box, blur-up/skeleton placeholder, fade-in and error state

PrtLightbox.name: PrtLightbox
PrtLightbox.description: Web-gallery image viewer on the native <dialog> substrate: centered/contained default + fullscreen opt-in, carousel nav, thumbnail rail, counter, click-to-zoom, View-Transition thumbnail morph

PrtList.name: PrtList
PrtList.description: Typographic list — deliberate rhythm, house square/dash marks, styled links; drop a list in and it looks right

PrtListing.name: PrtListing
PrtListing.description: Grid⇄list collection view — one item array, two presentations, a `view` model for the toggle; auto-fill RWD, gutters solved once

PrtListingParams.name: PrtListingParams
PrtListingParams.description: Spec sheet — name/value rows on a real <dl>, zebra or hairline, mono numerals, per-row value slot

PrtLoader.name: PrtLoader
PrtLoader.description: Spinner: the house icon mechanism spinning, seed-tintable

PrtLoadingBar.name: PrtLoadingBar
PrtLoadingBar.description: Top loading bar: useLoadingBar() lifecycle (start/trickle/finish/error) — simulated progress, never a looping sweep. Between progress and loader, really neither

PrtMegaMenu.name: PrtMegaMenu
PrtMegaMenu.description: Mega menu — whole nav bar with bar-anchored full-width panels (popover + CSS anchor positioning, zero JS layout); data-driven link groups or a per-item panel slot

PrtMenu.name: PrtMenu
PrtMenu.description: Action menu on the anchored-panel substrate — consumer-provided trigger via slot props, flat or grouped items, danger items, flat full-bleed panel, select-grade keyboard model

PrtModeToggle.name: PrtModeToggle
PrtModeToggle.description: Color-mode switcher recipe — wires useMode() 2-state (light/dark, no system) into a click-to-toggle icon button or PrtSegmented (both visible); kit-owned, no inject

PrtNotice.name: PrtNotice
PrtNotice.description: Inline alert: quiet surface, intent-colored icon, optional dismiss

PrtPagination.name: PrtPagination
PrtPagination.description: Windowed pagination — boundary pages + ellipsis + sibling window (pure-TS paginate), quiet tabular-nums cells, accent on the current page

PrtProductCard.name: PrtProductCard
PrtProductCard.description: Storefront card recipe — PrtCard + PrtRating + PrtInputNumber + PrtBtn; slots over booleans, pre-formatted price, controlled favorite

PrtProgress.name: PrtProgress
PrtProgress.description: Determinate progress: bar and circle (the 2025 ring). Indeterminate/top-bar duty lives in PrtLoadingBar

PrtProse.name: PrtProse
PrtProse.description: Premium em-free typography wrapper for non-hand-authored content (rendered Markdown, CMS/HTML, body copy) — lobotomized-owl rlh rhythm, two-ratio fluid cqi scale, token-mapped, the not-prose escape hatch

PrtRadioGroup.name: PrtRadioGroup
PrtRadioGroup.description: Radio group as a fieldset: options-driven, shared native name, identity-colored checked dot

PrtRating.name: PrtRating
PrtRating.description: Discrete rating radiogroup — abstract square marks (star via icon prop), seed-tinted fill, hover preview, re-click to clear

PrtScrollArea.name: PrtScrollArea
PrtScrollArea.description: Scoped overlay scrollbar: native scroll + a token-driven custom thumb (no cursor-repulsion, Chrome+Firefox parity, no scroll-jacking)

PrtSegmented.name: PrtSegmented
PrtSegmented.description: Segmented control: a joined group of cells for single OR multiple selection (size pickers, view switches, filter/format toolbars); seed-tinted active fill

PrtSelect.name: PrtSelect
PrtSelect.description: Fully styled select — custom anchored listbox panel (never the native browser dropdown), typed values, option icons, filled/outline/minimal variants

PrtSidebar.name: PrtSidebar
PrtSidebar.description: Desktop-first app nav — expanded⇄icon-rail (CSS-var width, grid auto-track coupling), nested groups (grid 0fr→1fr), rail flyouts (PrtMenu anchor substrate) + tooltips, mobile→PrtDrawer; data-array nav, no inject

PrtSkeleton.name: PrtSkeleton
PrtSkeleton.description: Loading placeholder: line, block and circle shapes, composed by the consumer

PrtSlider.name: PrtSlider
PrtSlider.description: DAW-grade fader on Pointer Events — relative/absolute drag, tapers (log/dB), Shift-fine, detents, dual thumb, vertical; rides _shared/useValueEngine

PrtSteps.name: PrtSteps
PrtSteps.description: Wizard step indicator row — states derive from the v-model index, square-ish rounded-mark chips (tabular numeral / check), current is the one accent moment, optional clickable back-navigation; buttons and step content belong to the consumer's wizard

PrtSticky.name: PrtSticky
PrtSticky.description: Drop-in sticky wrapper with stuck-state styling baked in (hairline + raise on pin), detected via a VueUse IntersectionObserver sentinel

PrtTabs.name: PrtTabs
PrtTabs.description: Underline tabs — ghost triggers over a hairline, one anchor-positioned 2px accent indicator (slides where anchors interpolate, zero JS measurement); optional per-value panels via slots

PrtTagsInput.name: PrtTagsInput
PrtTagsInput.description: Token field — chips + inline input in one field-looking wrapper; Enter/comma/blur/paste commits, two-step backspace, roving chip focus, reject reason codes

PrtTextarea.name: PrtTextarea
PrtTextarea.description: Multi-line text input with filled/outline/minimal variants, error and disabled states

PrtTimeline.name: PrtTimeline
PrtTimeline.description: Timeline with the full 8-layout alignment matrix (orientation × align) — flex/grid engine, square marks on a hairline, per-item seeds

PrtToast.name: PrtToast
PrtToast.description: Toasts: useToast() queue + PrtToaster top-layer host (six positions) + presentational PrtToast (quiet/solid)

PrtToggle.name: PrtToggle
PrtToggle.description: Switch with hidden native input (role=switch), identity-colored ON track, optional inline label

PrtTooltip.name: PrtTooltip
PrtTooltip.description: Tooltip on CSS anchor positioning + popover hint — zero JS layout

PrtUploader.name: PrtUploader
PrtUploader.description: File selection/validation/preview dropzone — no transport; drag-drop, paste, directory mode, object-URL previews, batched reject reason codes

splashscreen.name: splashscreen
splashscreen.description: Splashscreen starter — Mode A (useSplashDismiss, the first-paint static splash from the boot snippet) + Mode B (PrtTransitionMask, in-app route mask + View Transitions); JS-driven removal (FF allow-discrete bug), readiness chain, no FOUC
